Reset & Copy PIN

Admin walkthrough for sharing student credentials manually

Step 1 of 6
Log in to the Admin Dashboard
Sign in with your admin credentials. You'll see the main dashboard with Admin Quick Actions and module cards.
Scroll down to find the C2A (Cognition to Action) section at the bottom of the dashboard.
Step 2 of 6
Click "Student Roster" in C2A Admin Tools
In the C2A section, find the C2A Admin Tools panel on the right. Click "Student Roster" (circled in red).
The Student Roster shows all C2A students with their status, timepoints, and action buttons.
Step 3 of 6
Click the key icon to reset a student's PIN
Each student row has a key icon in the Actions column (circled in red). Click it to start the PIN reset.
The key icon is the first button in the Actions column. The other buttons are for timepoint assignment and student removal.
Step 4 of 6
Confirm the PIN reset
A confirmation dialog appears showing the student's name. Click "Reset PIN" to generate a new PIN. The old PIN stops working immediately.
This action is instant and cannot be undone. The student will need the new PIN to sign in.
Step 5 of 6
The PIN has been reset -- view the new credentials
The PIN has been reset successfully. A panel shows the Login URL, Username, and new PIN. Click "Copy credentials" to copy all three.
The new 4-digit PIN is generated automatically. The student can sign in immediately with it.
Step 6 of 6
Copy and share with the student
After clicking "Copy credentials," all three fields are copied to your clipboard. Paste them into an email or message to the student.
You can reset a student's PIN as many times as needed. Each reset generates a fresh PIN.
1 / 6
